description: Rust web server using axum framework which transitively reaches hyper's vulnerable HTTP/2 serve_connection via axum::Server, triggering CVE-2023-26964.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: axum::Server::bind().serve() internally uses hyper's HTTP/2 serve_connection, reaching the vulnerable code path transitively through the framework.

findings.human_justification: axum::Server internally delegates to hyper's HTTP/2 stack, transitively invoking serve_connection. The vulnerable code path is reached through the framework.
